title: Prime Brokerage Operations Analyst (Contract)
description:
Our client (a foreign investment bank) is looking for Prime Brokerage Operations Analyst to join their team.

As a member of the team, the individual will be required to learn onboarding, configuration, cash processing, and allocation processes to support cash equity trading across businesses. The individual will be given the opportunity to work closely with Business and Client Service representatives and will need to comfortable communicating across all levels within Business, Technology and other Operations groups.

MAIN RESPONSABILITIES:

The primary function of the role is to help manage a growing business, supporting clients who trade cash equity with client.

Support clients to meet their post trade execution needs, including managing complex transaction requests and queries, as well as, settlement of the client's transactions to a high quality standard.

SKILLS REQUIRED:

We are looking for an enthusiastic and committed individual who is looking to operate in a dynamic working environment where communication and teamwork skills are essential.

Exceptional client service and relationship building are required to interact with our clients and the team.

Team oriented, proactive, self-motivated

The candidate should have a control focus and be achievement orientated to produce results to ensure that all risk is mitigated.

Work experience in a trade support, or securities middle office, or cash equities processing role of 1-2 years

Equities Industry and market knowledge would be an advantage

Experience of vendor platforms (CTM, Omgeo, Traiana, Smartbridge) would be an advantage

Experience at bulge bracket bank and middle office experience dealing with clients/internal stakeholders required.

This is a 6 months contract role will subject to extension and conversion

Reg No. R1100673
EA No. 99C3289

postedCompany.description:
SKILLSFORCE MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY PTE LTD

 

Integrating People Competency

 

Skillsforce provides Recruitment and Human Capital Solutions tailored to our clients’ needs so that they can meet the challenges of today’s dynamic business environment.


About Us:
Skillsforce Management Consultancy Pte. Ltd. was established in 1998 and has since grown into a successful enterprise specializing in recruitment for temporary, contract, and permanent positions. Our services also extend to HR Consultancy for start-up companies and HR Outsource Services for SMEs. Additionally, we support work pass services, including application, renewal, and cancellation of work passes.

Our Unique Approach:
What sets us apart from our competitors is our focus on integrating people competencies. We don’t just recruit the most competent talents; we ensure they align with our clients’ cultural fit and corporate values, helping them achieve their business goals and objectives. We pride ourselves on providing high-level search services while offering competitive rates.


Our Agile and Customized Services:
Thanks to our boutique setup, we can respond quickly to our clients' needs, customizing our service offerings and pricing to meet their dynamic business requirements. We stay closely aligned with our clients' objectives and goals.
